# allDay

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the event is an all-day event.

## Declaration

```swift
let allDay: Bool
```

## Discussion

This may be `true` if the date or date range doesn’t specify a time.

## Calendar event properties

- **startDate**: An optional date that may contain the start date of the event.
- **endDate**: An optional date that may contain the end date of the event.
- **startTimeZone**: An optional time zone object that may contain the time zone of the start date of the event.
- **endTimeZone**: An optional time zone object that may contain the time zone of the end date of the event.
